input.command:
git add index.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add game UI: status bar, new game button, and captured pieces display

- Status bar shows current turn with color dot, check warnings, and
  game results (checkmate/stalemate) with styled indicators
- New Game button resets all game state (board, turn, captures)
- Captured pieces displayed grouped by color, sorted by piece value
- Last-move highlighting and subtle piece appearance animation
- Responsive layout that works on desktop and tablet sizes
- Clean wrapper layout with consistent dark theme styling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --draft --title "Add game UI: status bar, new game button, captured pieces" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Status bar** above the board shows current turn (with color indicator dot), check warnings in red, and game results (checkmate/stalemate) in gold
- **New Game button** resets all game state: board positions, turn, captured pieces, and highlights
- **Captured pieces display** for each player, sorted by piece value (queen first, pawns last)
- **Last-move highlighting** and subtle piece appearance animation for polish
- Responsive layout works on desktop and tablet screen sizes
- Everything remains in the single `index.html` file

## Test plan
- [ ] Open index.html and verify status bar shows "White's turn" with white dot
- [ ] Make moves and confirm turn indicator updates correctly
- [ ] Put a king in check and verify red "Check!" warning appears
- [ ] Play to checkmate/stalemate and verify gold result message
- [ ] Capture pieces and verify they appear in the correct captured row
- [ ] Click "New Game" and verify all state resets (board, turn, captures, highlights)
- [ ] Test on narrow viewport (< 500px) to verify responsive layout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.text:
All done. The only uncommitted change is `.claude-hub.jsonl` which was already modified before this task (pre-existing).

**PR created:** https://github.com/minyic7/claude-hub-demo-chess/pull/5

Here's what was implemented:

- **Status bar** with turn indicator (color dot + text), red "Check!" warning, and gold checkmate/stalemate result
- **New Game button** that fully resets board, turn, captured pieces, and all highlights
- **Captured pieces display** — two rows (one per player) showing captured pieces sorted by value
- **Last-move highlighting** with subtle yellow tint on from/to squares
- **Piece appearance animation** on moves for polish
- **Responsive design** with adjusted sizing for narrow viewports (< 500px)
